system.benefit: Reverse hit location dice for melee attacks
system.description: The character has a degree of control over where his melee attacks land. When determining hit location for a melee attack, the character may use the dice as rolled, or he may reverse them, choosing the preferred location. For example, if Cassus rolls a 37 to hit a Chaos Heretic, this would ordinarily strike the Right Leg. However, since he has the Sure Strike talent, he could choose to hit the Body (37).
